name: The Club at Pelican Preserve Weddings & Events
description:
Thank you for your consideration of hosting your next celebration
with The Club at Pelican Preserve! For the past 15 years, my team and I have had the pleasure of bringing so many celebrations to life– from sweet sixteens to golden anniversaries, from college formals to any kind of wedding you can imagine!

Our 26,000+ square foot Clubhouse is here to welcome your guests for an evening of comfort and style. Our spacious Osprey Room can accommodate even the grandest of galas, with additional bar areas and a patio balcony complete with chic firepits and lounge furniture for your guests to take in the night air. As an Audubon International Gold Certified Sanctuary, our peaceful preserve provides stunning natural vistas for both guests and local wildlife alike.

 It is our standard of service excellence that each and every one of our hosts, along with their guests, are delighted with their experience at The Club. We are here to offer any assistance in planning, securing special rentals and providing assistance with the setup and cleanup of parties– allowing our hosts to relax and be able fully celebrate with their loved ones. 

Please feel free to contact me with any questions. Thank you for your
consideration of The Club for your celebration.
